title: corybas koresii
intro: Corybas koresii, also known as the New Zealand orchid or greenhood orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Corybas koresii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Traditional herbal preparations of Corybas koresii include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
